PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?show(SUBSTR(STR(?start_date) , 1 , 4) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?show wdt:P161 wd:Q704107 .
  ?show wdt:P31 wd:Q12633730 .
  ?show p:P161 ?statement .
  ?statement pq:P1322 wd:Q247019 .
  ?show wdt:P571 ?start_date .
}
